data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifying choices to streamline user decisions and engagement.
data.technical_spec: Interfaces designed to minimize decision time.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizing the size, distance, and positioning of interactive elements.
data.technical_spec: Responsive touch targets and gesture controls in UI design.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Presenting information in chunks to avoid overwhelming the users.
data.technical_spec: UI organizes feeds, stories, and direct messaging into manageable segments.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Creating aesthetically pleasing interfaces perceived as more usable.
data.technical_spec: Employs modern design patterns and visual coherence.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Utilizing familiar design patterns to meet user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Consistency with mobile and web design standards for user familiarity.
